name: bind9-host
title: bind9-host
description:
DNS Lookup Utility
This package provides the 'host' DNS lookup utility in the form that
is bundled with the BIND 9 sources.

arguments.description: The -A ("almost all") option is equivalent to -a, except that RRSIG, NSEC, and NSEC3

command_examples: host [-aACdlnrsTUwv] [-c class] [-N ndots] [-p port] [-R number] [-t type] [-W wait] [-m flag]
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use host because host - DNS lookup utility.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use host as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `host [-aACdlnrsTUwv] [-c class] [-N ndots] [-p port] [-R number] [-t type] [-W wait] [-m flag]` as documented upstream for host.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair host with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `host --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
